blended.narrative: Lakeridge is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.6 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 767 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
